name: Pixel Fish
short_description: An eater with action roguelite elements. Swim around a hostile sea while you avoid dangers and eat fish to gain experience and grow. Play as one of twelve unlockable characters, each with different traits. Earn evolution points to upgrade your stats, allowing you to eat ever-larger fish.
detailed_description:
Pixel Fish is a roguelite eater game starring a little orange fish named Sam.

Swim around a hostile sea while you avoid dangers and eat fish to gain experience and grow. Play as one of twelve unlockable characters, each with different traits. Earn evolution points to upgrade your stats, allowing you to eat ever-larger fish.

You will encounter three bosses as you fight your way up the food chain. Enter whirlpools that lead to side areas with extra activities and lore. As you earn achievements and progress, you will unlock equipable mods that alter gameplay.

The difficulty can be adjusted up or down, enabling you to decide if you want a casual swim, or a fish-hell experience, while you help Sam discover the truth that waits at the top..


Features:
  • Eat fish to grow and earn evolution points that are used to upgrade stats
  • Play as one of twelve unlockable characters with different traits
  • Equip mods that offer bonuses or alter gameplay
  • Enter whirlpools for side activities
